title: bus.tengine.phantom_wire.detected v1
description: When: The tengine-reflect detect.sh script finds a function with a docstring claiming to be called by a consumer, but grep cannot find any actual call site. Source: /tengine. Indicates a stale or invented API contract that should be cleaned up.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

file.description: Absolute path to the source file containing the phantom wire function.

line.description: Line number in the file where the docstring claiming the consumer relationship appears.

docstring.description: The docstring content that makes the claim about being called by a specific consumer.

claimed_consumer.description: The consumer name that the docstring claims calls this function; the consumer that cannot be verified by grep.

grep_evidence.description: The grep command and its output used to try to find a real call site; empty if grep found nothing.
